title: Weekly Surge In Labor Union Strike Mentions In Rss Feeds Signals Industrial Sector Caution
thesis: An increase in news mentions about labor strikes often precedes operational disruptions in industrial companies. Rising strike chatter signals potential labor disruptions affecting industrial output.
data_sources: RSS news feed counts for labor strike keywords
signal_logic: Enter short XLI if weekly RSS strike mentions rise by more than 30% vs prior 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI if weekly RSS strike mentions rise by more than 30% vs prior 4-week average Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if mentions drop below 10% above baseline
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use RSS news feed counts for labor strike keywords via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor strike news cycles are frequent and often intensify before resolution or escalation.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in labor union strike mentions in RSS feeds signals industrial sector caution

data.source: RSS news feed counts for labor strike keywords

schema.behavior: An increase in news mentions about labor strikes often precedes operational disruptions in industrial companies.

market_impact.rationale: Rising strike chatter signals potential labor disruptions affecting industrial output.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly RSS strike mentions rise by more than 30% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if mentions drop below 10% above baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor strike news cycles are frequent and often intensify before resolution or escalation.

title: Weekly Surge In Consumer Stress Google Trends For Credit Card Maxed Out Boosts Financial Sector Caution

entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLF if weekly search interest exceeds 20% above 8-week moving average Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search interest drops below 10% above baseline
